subcodes.first_line: God beareth witness that there is no God but Him, and He Who speaketh is indeed the One mentioned in the Books and inscribed in the Scriptures [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: شهد الله انه لا اله الا هو و الذی ینطق انه لهو المذکور فی الکتب و المسطور فی الزبر
subcodes.subjects: @modes; manner; speed; size of divine revelation, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @spiritual transformation
